h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: “they was late” sounds more doubtful to me
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I didn’t realise the doubtful one could count as evidence rather than just another mistake.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner initially seeks to identify sloppy or incorrect dialect forms solely to correct them for the essay.
The learner systematically applies the distinction between statistical significance and operational value to each new metric introduced by the tutor.

scored.recoheredEarlier: picturing one big flood doing the main work
scored.statedInsightEvidence: the one-off mark and the carrying-away line feel more separate now.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will simply identify the physical scar and route on the rock face as prompted by the tutor.
The learner seeks to refine their legal note by clarifying the distinction between factual innocence and procedural presumption.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I feel clearer about the boundary
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was expected to continue expanding the trophic cascade to include more ecosystem effects.
